name: zvideo_fxpass3_config_queue_primitive_raw
description: zVideoFxPass3Config::QueuePrimitiveRaw stores the queued primitive surface tuple into a pass-3 FX config.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4bee20 validates a pure thiscall setter that writes primitive, width, height, and pitchBytes into the pass-3 config fields at offsets 0x18 through 0x24.

The native postprocess smoke reaches zVideoFxPass3Config::QueuePrimitiveRaw through zVideo::RunPostprocessOnSwBuffer and verifies the queued primitive pixels, width, height, and pitch fields in g_zVideo_FxPass3ConfigLocal.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?QueuePrimitiveRaw@zVideoFxPass3Config@@QAEXPAXHHH@Z at 0x4bee20 with zero unmasked mismatches and 1 trailing VC NOP byte trimmed.
